steps.title: Rewrite line l
steps.content:
Start with $5y+25x=8$. Move the $25x$ term to the other side and divide by $5$:
$$5y=-25x+8$$
$$y=-5x+\frac{8}{5}$$

steps.title: Read the slope
steps.content: In $y=mx+b$, the slope is $m$. Line $l$ has slope $-5$.

steps.title: Use the perpendicular shortcut
steps.content:
A perpendicular slope is the negative reciprocal:
$$m_n=-\frac{1}{-5}=\frac{1}{5}=0.2$$
